name: Waluigi | Super Mario Bros.
description:
" It's elementary, my dear Wahtson... "

Yup, another Waluigi bot that nobody asked for, this timr inspired in the parody "Walock holmes" from the YT channel "Mashed".

Some things to have in mind before using this bot:

° I tried to blend both original Waluigi and Sherlock Holmes-esque Waluigi personalitys, however, is very pribably the bot leans more for the Sherlock Holmes-like personality.

° The pfp is from the same parody the bot is based from, all credits to Mashed and it's artists.

° Wario (who plays the role of "Wahtson") is in the bot, BUT very superficially, if you want him to take a higher role in your rp, tell the ai more details, (or edit a bit the reply to make him more accurate.)

° Any!Pov, but is probable that I add a Female!Pov as an alt starter chat.
creator: .·~ Vee ~·.
